feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)

entry.title: Over and out, Bruce
entry.summary:
Author: CallMeKlair

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,570Chapters: 5/80Kudos: 13

Summary: Batman has been through a rough patch: first, he falls from a building; then, he is turned into a vampire and, finally, he starts falling in love with the man he hates: Superman.

entry.title: Candle Against The Wind
entry.summary:
Author: LoneChestnutTree

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,512Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 19

Summary: 'The flurry of wind does not snuff the flame from the candle, despite. But a stronger wind blows, and it does. The air is full. Something stronger than him and his misery. He does not lift his head. To his right, a figure by the archway.  Suddenly, his kneeling reverence made sense.'Bruce gets injured. Clark visits. Winter arrives. And they are in the middle of it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Physics of Familiarity
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,690Chapters: 1/11Kudos: 7

Summary: Lois Lane knows Clark Kent the way you know a city you've lived in for twelve years—by which streets flood in heavy rain, which shortcuts only work on Tuesdays, which silences mean danger and which mean he's just watching a bird. Alfred Pennyworth has been recording Bruce Wayne's vital signs, dietary intake, psychological indicators, and patrol efficiency for thirty years. He has documentation. He has baselines. He has thirty years of knowing exactly what this man looks like. Neither of them recognizes what's sitting across from them at breakfast. At Tuesday lunch. In the study at 6 AM in Thomas Wayne's Edinburgh sweater, holding coffee with both hands, watching the garden like it's somewhere he's allowed to be. They came to the same conclusion by different routes: something is wrong. They're beginning to suspect they might be wrong about that.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Don't Dream it's Over
entry.summary:
Author: NightTwink73

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,459Chapters: 7/20Kudos: 34

Summary: Eight months after Clark and Lois’s divorce, a breakup letter appears on Commissioner Gordon’s desk—addressed to Batman. But everything about it is wrong. Dear Batman,I can’t do this anymore. Whatever this is between us—it isn’t fair to either of us. You’ve always kept me at a distance, and I told myself I was okay with that, but I’m not.I need something real. Something you were never willing to give me.Don’t try to find me. I’m safe, and I won’t be coming back.I love you. Goodbye.— Superman As Bruce investigates, it quickly becomes clear: maybe the letter isn’t lying about Clark not coming back—and that’s a terrifying thought. Meanwhile, Clark wakes up in a dream life, living beside the man he’s never dared to love… trapped in a prison disguised as perfection.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Two Heroes and a Baby
entry.summary:
Author: xxEmilee_Lunaxx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 104,423Chapters: 29/?Kudos: 544

Summary: In this AU, 19-year-old Bruce Wayne adopts 4-year-old Dick Grayson after he is orphaned by a tragic event at Haly's Circus. Bruce is in over his head trying to juggle establishing himself as a responsible and valuable asset to Wayne Enterprises, beginning his vigilante work in Gotham as The Batman, and parenting a young child despite not knowing where to start. After struggling to get good press and constantly being seen as an irresponsible nepo baby, he sets up an interview at The Daily Planet. That's where he meets 19-year-old intern Clark Kent, who is eager to write a good story to begin his career as a journalist. After Clark agrees to keep an eye on Dick during his interview, Bruce realizes he has a knack for watching children, especially young Dick Grayson. Bruce asks Clark to come live with him at Wayne Manor on a 6 month assignment as Dick's nanny, and in return, will let Clark write the story of a lifetime--an expose on his life that no other reporter has even come close to. Clark reluctantly agrees, but is hiding a secret from Bruce--his life as the superhero, Superman! As the two begin their friendship and double lives as heroes, they learn valuable lessons in friendship, love, and parenting.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The protector
entry.summary:
Author: Hejsan_Svejsan_Booo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,855Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 40

Summary: Bruce made a promise when Dick was young, he would protect his son from his fame. He would not let his son be sold on the news and sexualised, he made it clear that if you tried you would regret it. But when a man who hurt him when he was young shows up Bruce knew that warnings were not enough, he deserved to get punched. No one messes with his kid.

entry.title: How to Lose Your Virginity (And Accidentally Fall in Love)
entry.summary:
Author: breathbetween

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,595Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 151

Summary: Bruce let out a deep, tired sigh and rubbed at his temple with his glove. “Speak,” he grunted. “You- you mean that-” Clark took a sharp breath, his voice coming out thin, like air slipping from a deflating balloon. “You’re also a virgin?!” Bruce regretted engaging in this conversation instantly. It could have been such a peaceful night.  or whereBatman doesn’t do relationships. Superman is afraid he might hurt someone if he tries. So they come up with a solution. Because what could possibly go wrong with losing your virginity to your best friend? Right?

entry.title: Every Billionaire has his Boy Scout Boyfriend and Adopted Acrobat Son
entry.summary:
Author: ChaosQueen1015

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,205Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 56

Summary: Thanos won and next thing Peter knows is he's lying on the ground of some strange city called Metropolis. Not 24 hours later he's been adopted by Clark Kent also known as Superman and is figuring out how to manage this new world and redevelop his hero identity, all while working with his new best friend, Dick Grayson, to figure out how to get their dads together.

entry.title: Blinding Truth
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,647Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 15

Summary: When Bruce Wayne's parents are assassinated for his reform proposals, his uncontrolled spirit-magic nearly kills him. Death-servant Clark abandons his sacred duty to save Bruce's life—condemning a spirit to shadow-eternity and losing his own sight in a failed purification ritual. Now forsaken by his people and able to see only magic and mortality, Clark must keep Bruce's wild power from burning him out while wetlands warriors train them both for revolution.Bruce will return to Gotham to destroy the old guard families who murdered his parents. But first, he has to be worth everything Clark sacrificed.

entry.title: Forever and evermore (For Eternity)
entry.summary:
Author: starfishingbythehill

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,019Chapters: 3/7Kudos: 2

Summary: “Come on Clark, it isn’t even that scary!” Clark’s face reminds him of the statue in his mother’s garden, the one over the fountain. The scrunched nose, the distant eyes, the thin lips. Displeasure and acceptance both. He really doesn’t understand what’s wrong. “We climb higher in the barn.” “It isn’t the same thing !” Clark denies. “I can’t do it Bruce, I’m not allowed to. It would make Ma sad.” “You’re such a wuss.” Bruce rolls his eyes and jumps down the tree. Clark pouts, crossing his arms in front of himself. Bruce rolls his eyes harder. Clark never breaks the rules and he never seems happy about it. Anyway, he won’t even stay mad for long, they’re best friends so it’s okay. “Let’s go see the horses. Tommy is teaching me how to ride.” Clark smiles at him then. See? What did he say, it’s okay. They can’t stay mad at each other for long because they can’t stay away from each other for long. They are best friends after all.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Keeping Tabs (Or Clark journals about his best friend)
entry.summary:
Author: Not_BootyShakker9000

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,831Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 136

Summary: Clark had used writing to understand himself ever after his powers first appeared, he just didn't expect his little coping mechanism to turn in a new way of looking at his quickly forming crush. ---- Aka. Clark is a weirdo who writes everything he notices about Batman until he actually notices he's in love.

entry.title: Proof of Detection
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,377Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 31

Summary: The worst has already happened - Recognition, Rejection, devastation. Now Bruce and Clark are forced to work together to solve a mystery that could alter the course of the world, while helping to build the Justice League. Can Bruce live with what he's done? Can Clark forgive the ultimate betrayal? Will the League survive the fallout if they can't?

entry.title: How Long Has This Been Going On?
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,485Chapters: 10/12Kudos: 180

Summary: “On the roof. I know what it was,” The boy said.“What was it? What did you see?” Clark said, glancing around.“It was Death I think?” He replied.“Death? What does that mean?”“Death was watching,” John began matter of factly, raising a hand to point behind Clark, “Death was watching and he was looking at you.”Quickly, Clark whipped his head to look in the direction John was pointing. He turned just quickly enough to see a wisp of black disappear behind a building.ORBatman stalks the hell out of Superman. Bruce Wayne is intrigued by Clark Kent. Superman is horrified by Batman. entry.title: Clark's Daily Routine
entry.summary:
Author: Superbat_fan02

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,815Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 81

Summary: Clark was going about his usual routine at the Daily Planet, sitting at his desk with that day’s paper. He was looking over the story he’d been working on about Bruce; he was so focused that he didn’t hear Lois approaching.He didn’t notice her until he heard her voice right next to his ear. “Oh, look at that—it’s your boy toy, Kent.”(This is a fanfic inspired by a piece of fan art I saw on TikTok, so credit for the main idea behind this fanfic goes to @3IIluon)
